note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes; pending = specified behavior whose implementation (core/risk.Classifier, Phase 2) does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior).

scenarios.name: An unmatched band value stringifies as POLL_PAUSE
Irreversible operation classes are on the never-auto floor
A reversible operation class is not on the never-auto floor
The remediation lane fails closed by default
A low-risk reversible action is classified AUTO
A reversible-mixed action on a critical host is classified AUTO_NOTICE
A high-risk irreversible action is classified POLL_PAUSE
An incident with no learned prior is classified POLL_PAUSE
An AUTO-RESOLVE lacking bound evidence is downgraded to a poll
A canary-pinned action is forced to POLL_PAUSE
A leaked credential in the untrusted seed is redacted before it reaches the model or the ledger
A benign alert body is not mangled by the secret redaction pass
